en: Why would you call it that on your menu?
I don't know what to tell you, man.
Just give me all the bacon and eggs you have. Wait, wait.
ko: 그냥 베이컨과 계란을 다 줘. 잠깐, 잠깐.

en: I worry what you just heard was, give me a lot of bacon and eggs.
ko: 내가 방금 한 말은 베이컨과 계란을 많이 달라는 거야.

en: What I said was, give me all the bacon and eggs you have. Do you understand?
ko: 내가 한 말은, 네가 가진 모든 베이컨과 계란을 달라는 거야. 이해했어?
